# QA Evidence Requirements Checklist: Demo Frame QA Evidence

**Purpose**: Requirements-quality checks for human QA workflow, visual frame export evidence, capture configuration, artifact retention, and reviewability.
**Created**: 2026-06-03
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are the required components of a frame bundle (frame images and contextual metadata) explicitly enumerated? [Completeness, Spec §User Story 1, Spec §FR-001, Spec §FR-002]
- [ ] CHK002 Are required metadata fields fully listed beyond scenario name, timestamp, and run identity, or explicitly limited to those fields? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002, Gap]
- [ ] CHK003 Are capture configuration inputs defined for both scenario selection and cadence (including allowed ranges or enums)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003, Gap]
- [ ] CHK004 Are retention and cleanup expectations fully specified (duration, ownership, deletion triggers)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-004, Gap]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK005 Is "visual export enabled" defined with a concrete toggle and default behavior? [Clarity, Ambiguity, Spec §FR-001, Spec §FR-007]
- [ ] CHK006 Is "predictable, reviewable location" specified with a concrete pathing/naming convention? [Clarity, Ambiguity, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK007 Is "capture cadence" quantified with units, rounding rules, and behavior at scenario boundaries? [Clarity, Ambiguity, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK008 Is the definition of "review-ready frame bundle" clear enough to verify without extra interpretation? [Clarity, Ambiguity, Spec §User Story 1]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK009 Do failure-visibility requirements align with the success criterion that failures are visible in test reports? [Consistency, Spec §FR-005, Spec §SC-004]
- [ ] CHK010 Are the quality gates requiring human QA completion consistent with the documented workflow and checklist requirements? [Consistency, Spec §FR-006, Spec §Constitution Alignment]
- [ ] CHK011 Are retention expectations consistent with the "locate under 2 minutes" success criterion? [Consistency, Spec §FR-004, Spec §SC-002]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK012 Is "100% of configured demo test runs" in SC-001 precisely scoped (what counts as configured, and what is excluded)? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK013 Is the "under 2 minutes" location metric defined with a timing method and start point? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-002]
- [ ] CHK014 Is the minimum QA review record requirement measurable (where records live, who signs off)? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-003, Gap]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK015 Are requirements defined for the primary reviewer flow from bundle discovery to review record completion? [Scenario Coverage, Spec §User Story 1, Spec §User Story 3, Gap]
- [ ] CHK016 Are requirements defined for developer-configured subsets and cadence changes between runs? [Scenario Coverage, Spec §User Story 2, Gap]
- [ ] CHK017 Are requirements defined for running tests with visual export disabled while still supporting QA workflow expectations? [Scenario Coverage, Spec §FR-007]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK018 Do requirements specify behavior when visual capture fails mid-run or yields zero frames? [Edge Case Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-005, Gap]
- [ ] CHK019 Do requirements specify behavior for insufficient storage or output path failures (including retry or abort policy)? [Edge Case Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-004, Gap]
- [ ] CHK020 Do requirements specify how evidence retention behaves when multiple runs reuse the same scenario or run identity? [Edge Case Coverage, Spec §FR-004, Gap]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK021 Are performance impact limits for visual export quantified (acceptable overhead or max cadence cost)? [Non-Functional Requirements, Spec §Assumptions, Gap]
- [ ] CHK022 Are access-control expectations for evidence storage (who can read/write) explicitly defined? [Non-Functional Requirements, Spec §Assumptions, Gap]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK023 Are dependencies on test orchestration and artifact publishing explicitly listed with required interfaces/ownership? [Dependencies & Assumptions, Spec §Assumptions, Gap]
- [ ] CHK024 Is the assumption that capture does not alter simulation outcome translated into a requirement with measurable constraints? [Dependencies & Assumptions, Spec §Assumptions, Gap]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK025 Is "human QA workflow" defined in terms of required steps, roles, and outputs? [Clarity, Ambiguity, Spec §User Story 3, Gap]
- [ ] CHK026 Are there conflicts between "visual export failures must be visible" and "tests still pass when export disabled"? [Consistency, Conflict, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-007]

## Execution Evidence (2026-06-03)

- [x] Native build succeeded (`cmake --build out/v3-native -- -m:1`).
- [x] Demo frame smoke test passed (`ctest -C Debug --test-dir out/v3-native -R banana_engine_win32_dx12_poc_demo_frame_smoke`).
- [x] Evidence war suite completed (`bash scripts/run-war-test-suites.sh --suite evidence`).
- [x] Evidence logs captured under `artifacts/native/human-feedback` (evidence-1-warfront.log, evidence-2-negotiate.log, evidence-3-comeback.log).
- [x] Gameplay war suite completed with demo frame export enabled (`BANANA_DEMO_FRAME_EXPORT=1 ... bash scripts/run-war-test-suites.sh --suite gameplay --non-interactive`).
- [x] Gameplay logs captured under `artifacts/native/human-feedback` (gameplay-*-*.log).
- [x] Gameplay demo frame bundles captured under `artifacts/native/032-demo-frame-qa/runs`.
- [ ] Human QA review record completed (draft review records created; preview frames appear as flat gradient, so manual visual review remains pending).
